## Summary

Describe the problem this PR solves and the chosen approach.

## Testing

- [ ] `./gradlew test`
- [ ] `./gradlew build`
- [ ] `cd docs && npm run check && npm run build` if docs changed
- [ ] Not run locally, with explanation below

## Operational Impact

Call out any effect on:

- auth or authorization
- security defaults
- queue behavior or retries
- Docker, Helm, or deploy flow
- docs or onboarding

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and intentionally small
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Docs were updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or private environment data were committed
